{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130033646301DA51D2361C66BD"}"},"total":37},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241517689578865419","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"对于想要了解清朝帝王的读者而言，本书绝对是必读之作。本书内容精炼，叙述具体全面。本书主要以清朝的12位帝王来予以叙述，作者以其自身新颖、别具一格的历史视角，通过简明直接的叙述方式，用扎实的文字功底将这12位帝王的雄才伟略的故事向读者娓娓道来，真实全面地再现了12位帝王的生平事迹，让读者对清朝历史有一个更加全面系统深入的了解。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686047346,"group_id":"6959122734722894878","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+75aPQ/3gq73nbL75jQ9+WucoRn0REbKT7yV27CE+OD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4013656781359518","user_name":"委屈巴巴的王巍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4013656781359518","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6959122734722894878","book_info":{"abstract":"本书选取了清朝近300年历史中出现的12位帝王来切入历史，将12位帝王的一生娓娓道来。
本书采用新颖的观点，通过简明的体例形式、精炼的文字内容，立体、真实地再现了清代帝王的生平事迹，深刻揭示中国古代社会由乱到治、由治到乱以及繁荣衰败的内在规律。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/a7c492c36d606e608e1014c754566768~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"曲波,清馨
